title: Notes
noNotesYet: You haven't joined any notes yet.
publicNotesPlaceholder: A list of notes anyone can join and related UI will be implemented after spec is finalized.
noteNotFoundOrNoAccess: Note not found or you don't have permission to view it.
noPermissionToEdit: You don't have permission to change settings.
deleteSectionDescription: Deleting this note will revoke all access to it.
deleteConfirmDescription: 「{{title}}」 will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
noPermissionToManageMembers: You don't have permission to manage members.
editPermission: Who can post to this note?
editPermissionAnyLoggedInWarningDescript: With this option, every authenticated user in this app who can open this note can edit its pages. Use it only if you intend open collaboration.
editPermissionHelpOwnerOnly: Only you (the owner) can add or edit pages.
editPermissionHelpMembersEditors: You and members with the editor role can add or edit pages.
editPermissionHelpAnyLoggedIn: Any signed-in user who can view this note (public or unlisted link) can edit pages.
publicAnyLoggedInConfirmTitle: Save with open collaboration for all signed-in users?
publicAnyLoggedInConfirmDescription: With this visibility and edit permission, every signed-in user who can open this note (public or unlisted link) can edit it. Continue?
publicAnyLoggedInCreateConfirmTitle: Create a note with open collaboration for all signed-in users?
publicAnyLoggedInCreateConfirmDescriptio: With this visibility and edit permission, every signed-in user who can open this note (public or unlisted link) can edit it. Continue?
loginToViewMyNotes: Sign in to view your notes
